testsuite.name: testcases.AlertsFunctionalTest

testcase.name: navigateToAlertsPage
testcase.system-out: Navigated to Alerts page via SwitchTo menu.

testcase.name: verifyAlertTextAndAccept
testcase.system-out: Expected: 'I am an alert box!' | Actual: 'I am an alert box!' PASS: Simple alert verified and accepted.

testcase.name: verifyConfirmCancel
testcase.system-out: Expected: 'You Pressed Cancel' | Actual: 'You Pressed Cancel' PASS: Confirm cancel message verified.

testcase.name: verifyPromptInput
testcase.system-out: Input: 'Vaibhav' | Expected: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today' | Actual: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today'

testsuite.system-out: Browser: chrome | URL: https://demo.automationtesting.in/Alerts.html Navigated to Alerts page via SwitchTo menu. Expected: 'I am an alert box!' | Actual: 'I am an alert box!' PASS: Simple alert verified and accepted. Expected: 'You Pressed Cancel' | Actual: 'You Pressed Cancel' PASS: Confirm cancel message verified. Input: 'Vaibhav' | Expected: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today' | Actual: 'Hello Vaibhav How are you today'
